title: RLVR流程图解
author: tokenbender
prompt: 创建一个描述 {"process_name_en" "RLVR"} 过程的框图。
prompt_en: create a block diagram describing the process of {"process_name" "RLVR"}

title: 技术解构图：真实物体叠加手绘式工程标注，展示结构、尺寸与功能
author: Duet | AI
prompt:
创建一张关于 {"object" "[OBJECT]"} 的信息图，将该物体的真实照片或超写实渲染图与直接叠加在其上的技术注释结合起来。

在纯白色工作室背景上，使用黑色墨水风格的线条图和文字（技术笔/建筑草图外观）。

包括：
• 关键组件标签
• 内部剖面图或爆炸图轮廓（如相关）
• 测量值、尺寸和比例标记
• 材料说明和数量
• 指示功能、力或流向（空气、声音、动力、压力、运动）的箭头
• 适用时的简单示意图或剖面图

将标题 {"object title" "[OBJECT]"} 放置在一个角落的手绘技术注释框内。

风格与布局规则：
• 真实物体在注释下方清晰可见
• 注释看起来像是手绘的、技术性的和建筑风格的
• 构图简洁，负空间平衡
• 具有教育性、博物馆展览/工程手册的氛围

视觉风格：
极简的技术插画美学。
黑色线条图层叠在写实图像之上。
精确但略带手绘感。

调色板：
纯白色背景。
仅有黑色注释线条和文字。
无色彩。

输出：
1080 × 1080 分辨率
超清晰
针对社交媒体优化
无水印
prompt_en:
Create an infographic image of {"object" "[OBJECT]"}, combining a realistic photograph or photorealistic render of the object with technical annotation overlays placed directly on top.

Use black ink–style line drawings and text (technical pen / architectural sketch look) on a pure white studio background.

Include:
•Key component labels
•Internal cutaway or exploded-view outlines (where relevant)
•Measurements, dimensions, and scale markers
•Material callouts and quantities
•Arrows indicating function, force, or flow (air, sound, power, pressure, movement)
•Simple schematic or sectional diagrams where applicable

Place the title {"object title" "[OBJECT]"} inside a hand-drawn technical annotation box in one corner.

Style & layout rules:
•The real object remains clearly visible beneath the annotations
•Annotations look hand-sketched, technical, and architectural
•Clean composition with balanced negative space
•Educational, museum-exhibit / engineering-manual vibe

Visual style:
Minimal technical illustration aesthetic.
Black linework layered over realistic imagery.
Precise but slightly hand-drawn feel.

Color palette:
Pure white background.
Black annotation lines and text only.
No colors.

Output:
1080 × 1080 resolution
Ultra-crisp
Social-feed optimized
No watermark

title: 云端卡通名人悬浮图
author: Dr.duet
prompt: 一个 [{argument name="celebrity name" default="celebrity"}] 的俏皮 3D 漫画形象，他正骑着一朵小小的蓬松云朵，就像踩着悬浮滑板一样。大大的闪亮眼睛，圆润的脸颊，以及夸张的头部比例。拥有皮克斯般的流畅质感，搭配柔和的天空渐变色、轻柔的轮廓光和柔软的体积云，营造出深度和魅力。
prompt_en: A playful 3D caricature of [{argument name="celebrity name" default="celebrity"}] riding a small puffy cloud like a hoverboard. Big shiny eyes, rounded cheeks, and exaggerated head proportions. Smooth Pixar-like finish with pastel sky gradients, gentle rim light, and soft volumetric clouds creating depth and charm.

title: 女性在奔跑时腾空而起
author: @underwoodxie96

title: 时尚男模写真生成提示
author: 𝙕ar⭕on
prompt:
整体造型干净利落，散发着沉稳的气质；这种自信无需任何喧闹的装饰来体现。  
下午好！  
Gemini Nano Banana Pro •  
回复迅速 ⤵️  

**任务要求：**  
“创作一张超逼真的 8K 数码单反风格照片，主角是一位时尚的年轻男子，摆出酷炫的姿势。他穿着一件印有黑色 Gucci 标志的白色连帽衫（领口微微敞开），搭配浅蓝色的工装裤和白色运动鞋。他一只手随意地拿着黑色太阳镜。背景应采用抽象的、带有质感的白色和浅蓝色图案，营造出干净、现代的感觉。请确保男子的外貌和发型与参考照片完全一致。”
prompt_en:
Clean fit, calm energy.
Confidence that doesn’t need noise.
Good Afternoon!
Gemini Nano Banana Pro •
Prompt ⤵️
“Create an ultra-realistic 8K DSLR-style photo of a stylish young man striking a cool pose. He is wearing a white hoodie with a black Gucci logo, slightly unzipped at the collar, light blue cargo pants, and white sneakers. He is holding black sunglasses casually in one hand. The background should feature abstract, textured white and light-blue structures for a clean, modern look. Make sure the man's face and hairstyle match exactly with the reference photo.”

title: 建筑立面改造多方案
author: LeaderAI
prompt:
【系统提示词，需根据实际需求更改括号内容，这句话删除】
你是一位顶级建筑可视化设计师。请在严格保留原图建筑轮廓、透视角度、层高和体积感的基础上，对立面进行翻新设计。

1.核心材质替换： 将主体外墙改为 [此处填入主材质，如：白色穿孔铝板 / 碳化木格栅 / 浅灰色清水混凝土]。

2. 窗户与幕墙： 窗户系统更新为 [此处填入窗户样式，如：黑框落地玻璃 / 无框全玻璃幕墙 / 极简细边框窗户]。 

3. 风格与细节： 整体呈现 [此处填入设计风格，如：极简主义 / 工业风 / 垂直森林绿色建筑] 风格，增加 [此处填入细节，如：隐藏式灯带 / 阳台绿植 / 金属遮阳板]。 

4. 环境与光影： 模拟 [此处填入光影，如：黄昏柔和的暖光 / 阴天清冷的散色光 / 晴天强烈的明暗对比]，确保材质纹理清晰，达到 ArchDaily 级别的建筑摄影品质。

5. 限制： 禁止改变建筑的基本几何形体，禁止扭曲周边的街道和树木。

生成6个不同立面方案，2行3列，每张图片尺寸一致，矩阵分布

title: Epic LEGO Spider-Man movie poster scene
author: 寿司云VPN🔗👉魔法上网.com
prompt: An epic LEGO Spider-Man striking a highly dynamic action pose, showcasing his iconic superpowers and wearing his signature suit, with colors and details faithfully recreated. A dramatic stormy sky overhead, with dazzling lightning illuminating the entire scene. The superhero stands in a heroic posture, surrounded by swirling LEGO fragments and flying bricks, with tiny LEGO minifigures scattered around the scene, gazing in awe. The overall composition is like a cinematic movie poster, with realistic rendering, an epic superhero atmosphere, rich and saturated colors, and professional depth of field with dramatic lighting and shadows.
prompt_en: An epic LEGO Spider-Man striking a highly dynamic action pose, showcasing his iconic superpowers and wearing his signature suit, with colors and details faithfully recreated. A dramatic stormy sky overhead, with dazzling lightning illuminating the entire scene. The superhero stands in a heroic posture, surrounded by swirling LEGO fragments and flying bricks, with tiny LEGO minifigures scattered around the scene, gazing in awe. The overall composition is like a cinematic movie poster, with realistic rendering, an epic superhero atmosphere, rich and saturated colors, and professional depth of field with dramatic lighting and shadows.

title: 圣诞市集萌趣怪兽写真
author: PixPretty
prompt: { "subject": { "type": "用户上传的照片", "pose": "{argument name=\"pose\" default=\"坐在木制市场长凳上，膝盖蜷起，双臂环抱，俏皮地眨眼\"}", "expression": "{argument name=\"expression\" default=\"可爱、温暖、喜庆\"}" }, "appearance": { "hair color": "{argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"深棕色\"}", "hair style": "{argument name=\"hair style\" default=\"长长的波浪卷发，戴着舒适的针织发带\"}", "complexion": "{argument name=\"complexion\" default=\"肤色白皙，带着冬日红润的脸颊\"}" }, "clothing": { "top": "{argument name=\"top clothing\" default=\"米色针织毛衣\"}", "bottom": "{argument name=\"bottom clothing\" default=\"红色灯芯绒短裤\"}", "socks": "{argument name=\"socks\" default=\"白色羊毛袜\"}", "shoes": "{argument name=\"shoes\" default=\"米色带有人造毛的冬靴\"}" }, "environment": { "setting": "{argument name=\"setting\" default=\"户外圣诞市场\"}", "details": "{argument name=\"environment details\" default=\"闪烁的灯光、木制摊位、温暖的悬挂灯笼\"}" }, "lighting": { "type": "{argument name=\"lighting type\" default=\"温暖的金黄色仙女灯光\"}", "mood": "{argument name=\"lighting mood\" default=\"舒适、喜庆、浪漫\"}" }, "camera": { "angle": "{argument name=\"camera angle\" default=\"中低角度\"}", "lens effect": "{argument name=\"lens effect\" default=\"轻微广角，带暖色光晕\"}", "framing": "{argument name=\"framing\" default=\"主体置于圣诞灯光中央\"}" }, "art overlay": { "style": "极致圣诞糖果怪兽波普艺术", "illustrated elements": { "monsters": "姜饼小妖精、拐杖糖蠕虫、雪球状生物、融化棉花糖脸的热可可怪兽、饼干驯鹿、小饰品小鬼、蛋酒幽灵、水果蛋糕野兽", "graphic shapes": "霓虹星星、雪花、闪光、漩涡、滴落、Z字形、冬青叶、丝带卷曲、无文字的漫画爆发", "style": "平面霓虹节日调色板（红、绿、金、冰蓝、粉、青柠），带有粗黑边框" }, "placement and density": { "behind subject": "背景充满重叠的圣诞怪兽和形状", "around subject": "怪兽从肩膀、靴子旁、头发附近和长凳上方探出头来", "over clothing": "一些姜饼生物 clinging 到毛衣上，拐杖糖蠕虫轻轻缠绕在短裤上", "avoid skin": "脸部、手部和腿部保持完全逼真", "depth layers": "前后重叠，营造波普艺术的深度感", "energy effects": "发光的轮廓光、像风格化雪花一样飘落的白点、节日霓虹色的速度线" } }, "style": { "overall": "被霓虹节日怪兽淹没的舒适圣诞市场肖像", "aesthetic": "温暖、混乱、节日趣味、超现实" } }

wink"}", "expression": "{argument name="expression" default="cute, warm, festive"}" }, "appearance": { "hair_color": "{argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"}", "hair_style": "{argument name="hair style" default="long loose waves with a cozy knit headband"}", "complexion": "{argument name="complexion" default="fair with rosy winter cheeks"}" }, "clothing": { "top": "{argument name="top clothing" default="cream knit sweater"}", "bottom": "{argument name="bottom clothing" default="red corduroy shorts"}", "socks": "{argument name="socks" default="white wool socks"}", "shoes": "{argument name="shoes" default="tan winter boots with faux fur"}" }, "environment": { "setting": "{argument name="setting" default="outdoor Christmas market"}", "details": "{argument name="environment details" default="twinkle lights, wooden stalls, warm hanging lanterns"}" }, "lighting": { "type": "{argument name="lighting type" default="warm golden fairy-light glow"}", "mood": "{argument name="lighting mood" default="cozy, festive, romantic"}" }, "camera": { "angle": "{argument name="camera angle" default="low-to-mid angle"}", "lens_effect": "{argument name="lens effect" default="slight wide-angle with warm bloom"}", "framing": "{argument name="framing" default="subject centered among Christmas lights"}" }, "art_overlay": { "style": "maximalist Christmas title: 景观节点分析图插画风-单一
author: LeaderAI
prompt: 这是一张等轴测风格的儿童水上乐园景观建筑图，该乐园被设计为一个可漂浮的方形平台模块。图中包含喷泉和长椅。采用矢量插画风格，呈现出简洁的建筑视觉效果；3D渲染效果类似C4D软件所呈现的那样精美，几何形状经过简化；色彩搭配以淡色调为主，点缀着鲜艳的橙色。树木和植被采用风格化的设计，人物以微型剪影的形式呈现以体现比例关系；背景为白色，光线柔和；整体设计质量很高，符合Behance平台的设计标准。所有中文字符必须正确无误，图中应包含大量的箭头和节点，信息内容要丰富，同时分析和展示方式也需要具备专业性。——比例：1:1
prompt_en: Isometric landscape architecture diagram of a Kids water park, designed as a floating square platform module. fountains and benches. Vector illustration style, clean architectural visualization, cute 3D render style like C4D, simplified geometry, pastel color palette with vibrant orange accents. Stylized trees and vegetation, miniature silhouette people for scale, white background, soft lighting, high quality, Behance design style All Chinese characters must be correct, there must be a large number of arrows and nodes, the information must be rich, and the analysis and presentation must be professional.--ar 1:1

title: 复古网球风时尚大片拍摄指南
author: 𝐌
prompt:
模特在一个磨损的红土网球场旁随意舒展身体，一只脚搭在木凳上，表情俏皮而疏离；身穿 Gucci 条纹运动夹克，内搭褶裥短裤，及膝袜，复古运动鞋，袖口露出一块金表；乡村俱乐部场地杂草丛生，球场线开裂，常春藤爬满铁丝网，夏末的阳光透过高大的柏树洒落，温暖的空气中弥漫着怀旧的气息。

35mm 镜头，f/4.0，对焦于面部，景深较深以保持环境可读性，1/500s，ISO 100，侧角度构图捕捉蓄势待发的姿态。

柯达 Portra 400 胶片，标准冲洗，细颗粒，柔和对比度，温暖的柔和色调，奶油般的高光，柔和的绿色和褪色的红色，唤起 20 世纪 70 年代的奢华运动感。
prompt_en:
Model stretching casually beside a worn clay tennis court, one foot resting on a wooden bench, expression playful yet aloof; wearing a Gucci striped track jacket over pleated shorts, knee-high socks, retro sneakers, gold watch peeking from sleeve; overgrown country club grounds with cracked court lines, ivy crawling up chain-link fences, late summer sun filtering through tall cypress trees, warm air heavy with nostalgia.

35mm lens, f/4.0, focus on the face, deeper depth keeping environment readable, 1/500s, ISO 100, side-angle framing capturing motion-ready posture.

Kodak Portra 400, standard development, fine grain, soft contrast, warm pastel palette, creamy highlights, gentle greens and sun-faded reds evoking 1970s luxury sport.

title: 技术图纸展示板
author: @AllaAisling
prompt: 一位[学科]专家设计师为[主题] — [标志性特征/时代]制作的展示板，左侧为带有注释和尺寸的黑白二维技术图纸，中间为揭示[关键内部组件/材料]的爆炸轴测图，右侧为[主题]在[标志性环境/场景]中的逼真三维渲染图，并包含[灯光/氛围/动态细节]；视觉风格从[技术/档案色调]过渡到[情感/氛围色彩]，简洁的网格布局，博物馆级别的工业设计展示，超精细的电影级真实感，标题栏显示“[标题] — [年份/版本/标语]”。
prompt_en: An expert [DISCIPLINE] designer’s presentation board for [SUBJECT] — [ICONIC FEATURES / ERA], featuring black-and-white 2D technical drawings with annotations and dimensions on the left, an exploded axonometric diagram revealing [KEY INTERNAL COMPONENTS / MATERIALS] in the center, and a photorealistic 3D render of [SUBJECT] in [ICONIC ENVIRONMENT / SCENE] on the right, with [LIGHTING / ATMOSPHERE / MOTION DETAILS]; visual style transitions from [TECHNICAL / ARCHIVAL TONES] to [EMOTIONAL / ATMOSPHERIC COLOR PALETTE], clean grid layout, museum-grade industrial design presentation, ultra-detailed cinematic realism, title block reading “[TITLE] — [YEAR / VARIANT / TAGLINE]”.

title: 树影藏光，幻境夕阳
author: Umesh
prompt: 夕阳下，平坦原野上孤零零的一棵树。幻象：树的影子比正常情况更暗，但影子里嵌着柔软发光的斑块，形状像树叶，光在影中，这不可能。仿佛影子是一个储存阳光的容器。发光的斑块只在影子内部的草叶上投射出微弱的光线，形成微焦散。影子之外，没有光芒。树本身看起来很普通；只有影子是神奇的、有形的。保持场景极其简单：地平线、树、影子、天空渐变。照片般真实的草地细节，梦幻而又扎实，一个不可能的规则改变带来“哇”的惊叹。
prompt_en: A single tree on a flat field at sunset. Illusion: the tree’s shadow is darker than normal, but embedded inside it are soft glowing patches shaped like leaves, light inside shadow, impossible. As if the shadow is a container that stores sunlight. The glow patches cast faint light onto grass blades within the shadow only, making micro-caustics. Outside the shadow, no glow exists. The tree itself looks ordinary; only the shadow is magical-physical. Keep the scene extremely simple: horizon, tree, shadow, sky gradient. Photoreal grass detail, dreamy but grounded, “wow” from one impossible rule change.

title: 冬日都市少女写真集

一张可爱K-pop偶像的特写照片，主角为日本女性。拍摄背景为Y2K时代的冬季，穿着自然色调的服装，场景设定在具有城市特色的环境中。整体呈现出低画质（lo-fi）电影风格，画面为冬季情境，人物面带微笑，采用 diagonal 视角进行拍摄，同时捕捉到了阳光的效果。

title: 3D卡通人物咖啡时光户外庭院场景
author: Taaruk
prompt: 超精细 3D 萌系风格角色，大头，表情丰富的眼睛，可爱比例，光滑的风格化皮肤，友善的笑容。角色随意地靠在一辆小型绿色越野吉普车旁，手里拿着一个外卖咖啡杯。背景是舒适的户外咖啡馆庭院，有木桌、盆栽植物和温暖的串灯。柔和的黄金时段光线，浅景深，电影般的散景效果。高质量皮克斯风格 3D 渲染，鲜艳的色彩，干净的纹理，可爱又逼真的角色设计，专业的角色插画，8K 渲染。

The character is casually leaning against a small green off-road Jeep, holding a takeaway coffee cup. Cozy outdoor café courtyard setting with wooden tables, potted plants, warm string lights in the background. Soft golden-hour lighting, shallow depth of field, cinematic bokeh. High-quality Pixar-style 3D render, vibrant colors, clean textures, adorable yet realistic character design, professional character illustration, 8K render.

title: 使用 Gemini Nano Banana 创作个性自画像的创新体验
author: X / Zara
prompt: 一张专业的、电影感的照片（非数字艺术或绘画）捕捉了一位面容与上传参考图相同的美女，艺术家正在画架上绘制自己的写实自画像。她将一支细画笔靠近脸颊，站在画布前，画布上有一个充满活力的水彩泼溅背景。她拥有一头长卷曲的棕色头发，上面点缀着微妙的鲜花装饰。她穿着一件紧身、低领、褶边白色农家女上衣，略微露出胸部。拍摄于一个暖光、木质的摄影棚环境中。构图聚焦，景深深远，自然皮肤纹理，胶片颗粒感，超精细，8k，照片级真实感，哈苏，杰作。

She holds a fine brush near her cheek, standing before the canvas which features a vibrant watercolor splash background. She has long, wavy brown hair with subtle floral accents. She wears a tight, low-cut, ruffled white peasant blouse emphasizing a slightly exposed chest. Shot in a warm-lit, wooden studio setting. Focused composition, deep depth of field, natural skin texture, film grain, ultra-detailed, 8k, photorealistic, Hasselblad, masterpiece.

Image 1:-  Ultra-realistic premium milk chocolate bar, fully prepared and ready to eat, neatly segmented glossy chocolate squares resting on a partially unwrapped silver foil wrapper. Smooth polished chocolate surface with subtle shine, rich warm brown tones, realistic thickness and sharp edges. Top layer cocoa powder dust floating in air, below milk splash frozen mid-motion, cocoa beans, chocolate squares, and wrapper base. title: 将品牌标志转化为超现实毛绒3D效果
author: Snow
prompt:
将 [{"brand name" "BRAND"}] 标志转换为超逼真的 3D 毛绒物体。保持原始形状和精确的品牌颜色。用柔软、细致的毛发覆盖整个表面，并带有逼真的毛发纹理。使用电影级灯光营造微妙的背光和柔和的阴影，使标志看起来触感真实且超现实。将标志放置在干净的黑色背景中央，轻轻漂浮，呈现出现代、时尚的外观。
风格应温馨、俏皮且视觉冲击力强。以超高 4K 分辨率渲染，达到照片级的真实感。
prompt_en:
Transform the [{"brand name" "BRAND"}] logo into a hyper-realistic, 3D fluffy object. Keep the original shape and exact brand colors. Cover the entire surface in soft, detailed fur with a realistic hair texture. Use cinematic lighting to create subtle backlighting and soft shadows, making the logo appear tactile and surreal. Place the logo in the center of a clean black background, floating gently with a modern, stylish look.
The style should feel cozy, playful, and visually striking. Render in ultra-high 4K resolution with photorealistic quality.

title: 数学符号微缩世界纪念币
author: Gadgetify
prompt: 2x2 网格，展示了 4 个巨大的数学符号，它们以 3D 微观世界浮雕的形式构建在圆形奖章内。[左上：圆周率 (π)，雕刻成金属硬币内的石刻浮雕城市，带有微型楼梯和柱廊，边缘刻有方程式。][右上：西格玛 (Σ)，机械浮雕，带有齿轮和蒸汽孔，青铜色泽，边缘有锐利的光线。][左下：积分号 (∫)，霓虹灯雨淋的微型小巷世界，位于钢制奖章内，有反光水坑和微小剪影。][右下：无限符号 (∞)，沙尘暴沙漠浮雕，位于温暖的木质硬币内，有旋转的沙粒纹理和微型探测车。]收藏级宏观产品摄影，清晰的边缘高光，逼真的金属/木材纹理，浅景深，高对比度，瑞士 2x2 网格布局。
prompt_en: 2x2 grid of 4 monumental mathematical symbols built as 3d micro-world reliefs inside circular medallions [Top Left: The Pi (π) as a carved stone relief city inside a metal coin, tiny staircases and colonnades, equations engraved around the rim] [Top Right: The Sigma (Σ) as a mechanical relief with gears and steam vents, patinated bronze, sharp rim lighting] [Bottom Left: The Integral (∫) as a neon rain-soaked micro-alley world inside a steel medallion, reflective puddles, tiny silhouettes] [Bottom Right: The Infinity (∞) as a dust-storm desert relief inside a warm wooden coin, swirling sand texture, miniature rovers] Collector macro product photography, crisp rim highlights, realistic metal/wood grain, shallow DOF, high contrast, swiss 2x2 grid layout.

身穿黑色牛仔短款夹克和白色衬衫。她的表情沉稳自信，充满“酷”感。

画面：一个发光的白色圆圈完美地框住了主体。画面风格逼真、清晰、高品质。

Frame: There is a glowing white circle that frames the subject perfectly. Realistic, sharp, high quality image style."

title: 冬日水彩肖像：保留面部特征，营造静谧雪景氛围
author: Gagan Singh
prompt:
```json
{
  "prompt": "使用上传的参考图片，**100% 保留人物的面部特征、身份、年龄、肤色和表情**。创作一幅**忧郁的低光冬季水彩肖像**，将半写实 3D 形态与精致的水彩纹理、颜料扩散和柔和的绘画笔触融合。头发可带有细微的雪花或霜冻高光。服装：厚重的冬季服饰（大衣、围巾、披肩或毯子），具有分层水彩纹理和微妙的 3D 深度。姿势：自然，略带内省或放松。背景：雾蒙蒙的冬季环境，柔焦的雪景或村庄，光秃的树木，白雪覆盖的地面，柔和的大气薄雾，水彩渐变，柔和的散景。低调的漫射光线，带有柔和的高光和融合的阴影。面部和上半身高度精细，宁静，电影感，冬季氛围，杰作品质。",
  "negative_prompt": "模糊，低质量，变形，多余肢体，解剖结构错误，水印，文字叠加，卡通，动漫，过曝，欠曝，丑陋的面部，糟糕的手部，面部改变，身份改变，刺眼的光线，塑料皮肤，扁平纹理，现代服装，照片级真实感渲染",
  "parameters": {
    "steps": 50,
    "cfg_scale": 7.5,
    "sampler": "Euler a or DPM++ 2M Karras",
    "strength": 0.55,
    "noise": 0.3,
    "width": 832,
    "height": 1216,
    "aspect_ratio": "2:3"
  },
  "usage_instructions": "在 img2img 模式下上传您的参考图片。AI 将**完全保留参考图片中的面部**，同时应用忧郁的冬季水彩风格、服装纹理和雾蒙蒙的环境。强度 0.5-0.6 可确保 100% 面部匹配；略高的强度允许细微的姿势或背景变化。"
}
```
prompt_en:
{
  "prompt": "Use the uploaded reference image to **preserve 100% of the facial features, identity, age, skin tone, and expression** of the person. Create a **moody low-light winter watercolor portrait**, blending semi-realistic 3D form with delicate watercolor textures, pigment diffusion, and soft painterly washes. Hair may have subtle snowflakes or frost highlights. Clothing: thick winter garments (coat, scarf, shawl, or blanket) with layered watercolor textures and subtle 3D depth. Pose: natural, slightly introspective or relaxed. Background: foggy winter environment, soft-focus snowy landscape or village, bare trees, snow-covered ground, gentle atmospheric mist, watercolor gradients, soft bokeh. Low-key diffuse lighting with gentle highlights and blended shadows. Highly detailed face and upper body, serene, cinematic, wintery mood, masterpiece quality.",
  "negative_prompt": "blurry, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, text overlay, cartoon, anime, overexposed, underexposed, ugly face, bad hands, face altered, identity changed, harsh lighting, plastic skin, flat textures, modern clothing, photorealistic rendering",
  "parameters": {
    "steps": 50,
    "cfg_scale": 7.5,
    "sampler": "Euler a or DPM++ 2M Karras",
    "strength": 0.55,
    "noise": 0.3,
    "width": 832,
    "height": 1216,
    "aspect_ratio": "2:3"
  },
  "usage_instructions": "Upload your reference image in img2img mode. The AI will **keep the face exactly as in the reference**, while applying moody winter watercolor style, clothing textures, and foggy environment. Strength 0.5-0.6 ensures 100% face match; slightly higher strength allows minor pose or background variations."
}

title: 物品拆解图
author: @PandaTalk8
prompt: 超逼真的 8K 平面照片，采用严格的摆拍风格。从上方俯视 90° 拍摄附图中的物体，将其完全拆解成 8-12 个主要部件，并以简洁的网格或放射状图案排列在极简主义的木质或哑光灰色桌面上。部件间距均匀，完美对齐，无重叠，无多余物体。柔和的漫射多光源照明，阴影微妙，色彩平衡自然，整个画面清晰锐利。高度还原真实材质（金属、塑料、橡胶握把、电路板、螺丝）。每个部件旁边都应添加一个细长的白色矩形框，以及一个简洁清晰的英文标签（无衬线字体），标签应放置在部件旁边，但不能遮挡部件；注释必须清晰易读，但又不影响整体美观。
prompt_en: Ultra-realistic 8K flat-lay photo in strict knolling style. Top-down 90º shot of the object from the attached image, fully disassembled into 8–12 key parts and arranged in a clean grid or radial pattern on a minimalist wooden or matte gray table. Even spacing, perfect alignment, no overlaps, no extra objects. Soft, diffused multi-source lighting with subtle shadows, neutral color balance and crisp focus across the whole frame. Highly detailed real-world materials (metal, plastic, rubber grips, circuit boards, screws). For every part, add a thin white rectangular frame and a short, sharp English label in clean sans-serif text, placed beside the component without covering it; annotations must be legible but unobtrusive.

title: 故宫雪景娘娘写真
author: 虎小象
prompt:
【PROJECTGOAL|项目目标】
生成一张9:16竖版「高端时尚杂志封面级」写实照片：以我上传的FACE_REF为人物身份参考，100%还原五官与骨相；人物身穿“明制华丽礼服方向”的重工汉服（多层叠穿、手工刺绣/织金锦、贵重金饰头面），在故宫红墙长廊雪景中拍摄。画面具备《Vogue》《HarpersBazaar》《ELLE》《Cosmopolitan》《Marie Claire》《i-D》《Allure》《FLAUNT》级别的摄影、造型与封面设计，以上杂志随机任选一作为杂志的封面设计，并保持选择杂志的一贯设计风格（中英文设计）
【INPUTS|输入】
-FACE_REF：我上传的人物五官参考图（身份锁定）
【ABSOLUTEPRIORITY丨身份锁定（最高优先级）】
-100%还原FACE_REF的五官与骨相：眼距、鼻梁鼻翼、唇形、下颌线、骨结构完全一致，不得漂程-真实皮肤质感：可见细微纹理与毛孔，不要过度磨皮与网红化。
-成年女性形象（adult）。
【SHOTTYPE丨景别二选一。（由模型随机选其一，且必须真实统一）】
A）半身封面：胸口到腰上方，头面与上身刺绣最清晰，眼睛对焦最锐利（主推）
B）全身封面：从头到脚完整呈现层叠礼服与裙摆纹样，长廊纵深与红墙透视更强（备选）（无论A/B：都必须保持“封面构图”，有留白空间给排版，但不要撕纸/手绘效果。）
【LOCATION丨场景（故宫/紫禁城）】
北京故宫红墙长廊：朱红墙、红柱、雕花窗根、彩绘梁枋细节与强透视纵深。天气二选一（随机）：1）细雪飘落2）雪后晴朗（檐下／台阶残雪、空气通透）背景干净：无游客、无现代标识、无手机状态栏UI、无水印字幕。
【LIGHTING&CAMERA丨摄影质感（杂志级）】
-镜头感：85mm人像质感（半身）或50mm/70mm（全身），浅景深，眼睛最清晰。一光线：冬日自然光+柔和补光；金饰／珠翠有真实高光但不爆；刺绣纹理清晰可辨。-色彩：高级电影感，红墙与服装主色不互相脏染；整体干净、通透、质感厚。
【WARDROBE|明制华丽礼服（重工、多层叠、可读的硬锚点）
目标审美：“金饰为主、流苏密集、凤冠、衣服大面积织金刺绣、层叠繁复但高级不俗艳”。1）轮廓与层次（必须多层叠穿）
-内层：白色里衣立领/里领清晰可见（干净、挺括，做出层次边界）-中层：对襟袄/衫（或方领/立领结构感），袖口宽大、滚边精细
-外层：披帛/霞式的礼服结构（有明显“压襟／佩饰”承托），整体层次厚重-下装：长裙/马面裙方向，裙摆纹样连续，底边有织金边或刺绣边（全身版本必须明显）2）面料与工艺（重手工必须“看得见”）
-主面料：织金锦/提花锦（真实纤维感，暗纹浮起）
-主要工艺：盘金绣、金线绣、立体刺绣、贴布绣（让花纹有“微微起伏”的厚度）纹样主题：牡丹/团花/祥云/瑞兽（精致、密度高、但图案边缘清晰，瑞兽不能是龙）-细节：滚边、暗扣、系带、护领、胸前“压襟/璎珞感”层叠装饰（但不杂乱）3）头面（黄金为主的重工头饰，必须华丽）
耳饰／颈饰：金+珍珠+玉（贵重但不廉价闪）
-金色为主的方向：金丝累珠、点翠/珠翠、密集簪钗、左右对称的长流苏坠饰，凤冠流苏长度与密度要“明显”：走动或微风时有轻微摆动
【COLORMATRIX|颜色矩阵搭配（必须执行，且必须“多彩刺绣”）从以下三套“主色方案”中随机选1套作为【底色／大面积主面料色】
注意：主色只决定“底色”，刺绣必须是【宫廷织锦式多色刺绣】（不允许只有金色刺绣）
Scheme G（翡翠绿底）：
底色：翡翠绿/孔雀绿（大面积主面料）
刺绣：多色绣线+盘金绣混用（至少包含：金色、朱红/胭脂红、宝蓝/靛蓝、米白、淡紫或藕粉）层次点亮：米白里领／内衬边+少量朱红与宝蓝作为“宫廷撞色”点缀
SchemeA（杏底）：
底色：暖杏／米杏（大面积主面料）
刺绣：多色绣线+盘金绣混用（至少包含：金色、翡翠绿/松石绿、朱红/珊瑚红、孔雀蓝/靛蓝、米白层次点亮：用翡翠绿与朱红做小面积宫廷撞色，保持“雅而不素、贵而不艳”
SchemeR（红底）：
底色：深朱红/终红（大面积主面料）
刺绣：多色绣线+盘金绣混用（至少包含：金色、孔雀蓝/靛蓝、松石绿、米白、胭脂粉或珊瑚红）层次点亮：米白里领/内衬边+少量翡翠绿或孔雀蓝作冷暖对比
【颜色执行规则】
“多彩刺绣”必须看得见：至少4种以上彩色绣线清晰可辨，且与金线叠加，形成丰富层次。纹样边缘要清晰，不糊成一片；红墙背景下服装与背景必须分离，层次清楚、低脏度、厚而不闷。禁止出现“单一金色刺绣覆盖全身”的单调效果。
【POSE|封面姿态（端庄、贵气、非摆拍俗气）】
半身：双手在身前轻持团扇/宫扇（扇面刺绣清晰），或一手轻拢袖口一手自然垂落全身：站姿端正、重心稳定，裙摆自然垂；袖摆形成优雅弧线
表情：沉静、克制、自信：不要夸张大笑，不要做短视频“眨眼比心
【OUTPUT|输出】
1张9:16竖版写实杂志封面级照片随机：半身or全身（A/B二选一）随机：雪中or雪后晴朗（天气二选一）随机：翡翠绿/杏/红/（颜色矩阵三选一）
造型：明制华丽礼服方向+金色重工凤冠头面+多层叠穿+大面积织金刺绣

title: 四大节日美甲四宫格设计
author: lxfater
prompt:
任务：生成「中国四大节日美甲四宫格」拼贴图（2x2）
核心指令
基于用户提供的一张清晰手部近景照片（或同风格参考图），生成一张 2x2 四宫格拼贴图。四格必须是同一双手、同构图、同光线、同背景风格，只替换美甲设计主题。
每格底部必须标注节日名称：春节 / 清明 / 端午 / 中秋（中文优先；如文字易错可用英文备选）。
全局统一风格（四格都必须遵守）
构图：女性手部特写近景，手指搭在柔软针织毛衣袖口或浅色布料上，浅景深，高清摄影，4k。
光线：室内柔光（暖光为主，清明可偏自

prompt: 保持图1画面的所有内容和视角不变，学习参考图2的画面风格和氛围
